Patch Set 6:

Andreas, Rest of your comments taken care in this patch set.

>What if .bak file already exists? What decides if a file >needs to be processed? 

lctl clear_conf" is based on "lctl replace_nids”, so its logic of bak files handling is the same as lctl replace_nids’s both ultimately calls mgs_replace_logs().

>This should process only files of the >form "{fsname}-{MDT,OST}nnnn" to avoid processing backup >files.


function config_to_clear() It takes care that bak files are skipped.

>My preference would be to create the backup log files with >the date in them, like "{fsname}-{MDT,OST}nnnn.bak" so that >it is very clear.

Done. Now the output comes out as...

<snip>
# debugfs -c -R "ls -l /CONFIGS" /dev/loop0
...
     86  100644 (1)      0      0   15272 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-client
     87  100644 (1)      0      0   14552 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-MDT0000
    128  100644 (1)      0      0    9976 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-OST0000
    134  100644 (1)      0      0    9976 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-OST0001
    133  100644 (1)      0      0    9976 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-OST0001-1476454535.bak
    136  100644 (1)      0      0   16328 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-client-1476454535.bak
    137  100644 (1)      0      0   15608 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-MDT0000-1476454535.bak
    138  100644 (1)      0      0   10504 14-Oct-2016 19:45 lustre-OST0000-1476454535.bak
<snip end>

replace_nids also gets the same .bak format
<snip>
   137  100644 (1)      0      0   16328 15-Oct-2016 11:57 lustre-client.1476512836.bak
    138  100644 (1)      0      0   15608 15-Oct-2016 11:57 lustre-MDT0000.1476512836.bak
<snip end>

commit.subject: LU-8727 mgs: remove skip records from config file
commit.message:
LU-8727 mgs: remove skip records from config file

Configuration logs are append-only files of limited size.  Over the
course of time the logs may grow over the limit size.  Usually,
configuration logs keep needless records marked as SKIP. The new lctl
command "clear_conf" is added to allow administartors to clear
configuration files by removing mentioned SKIP records. lctl man page
is updated.
conf-sanity test (for ldiskfs only) is added to test the new command.
